= Contents =
  - [[#DOCKER|DOCKER]]
      - [[#DOCKER#container control|container control]]
        - [[#DOCKER#container control#stop all containers|stop all containers]]
        - [[#DOCKER#container control#rm all containers|rm all containers]]

= DOCKER =

=== container control ===

==== stop all containers ====
{{{
   docker stop $(docker ps -a -q)
 }}}
==== rm all containers ====
{{{
   docker rm $(docker ps -a -q)
 }}}
